rag_slow: Retrieval latency spike. Students should find slow RAG span in trace.
tool_fail: Vector store or tool error. Students should identify error_type from logs.
cost_spike: Token usage spike. Students should explain higher output token cost.
pii_regex_bypass: Tấn công bypass bộ lọc PII bằng cách sửa định dạng regex. Students should identify the PII leak alert and find the leaked data in logs.
